title: solanaceae
intro: The Solanaceae rank, also known as the nightshade family, is a taxonomical grouping of flowering plants that includes a diverse range of species. This family encompasses a broad variety of plants, including tomatoes, potatoes, eggplants, peppers, and many others. The Solanaceae family is characterized by its complex flowers, often with five petals and a symmetrical structure, and its fruits can range from berries to capsules. With over 2,800 species, the Solanaceae family is one of the largest and most economically important plant families worldwide.
